theme_notes: Taglines draw from: Trump extending the US-Iran ceasefire while the Navy holds the seized cargo ship Touska; Japan's 7.7-magnitude earthquake triggering tsunami warnings; Bayern Munich's stoppage-time 4-3 elimination of Real Madrid in the Champions League quarterfinals; the Michael Jackson biopic 'Michael' opening April 24; and Harry Styles and Zoë Kravitz's diamond-ring engagement rumors.
settled: Clean slate. Trump extended the ceasefire. For now, everyone's calm.
Zero. The tsunami advisory lifted too. Two rare victories in one day.
Even. Michael Jackson's estate accountants couldn't clean ledgers this well.
youOwe: Under fifty. More of a ceasefire violation than an actual debt.
The earthquake hit 7.7. Your balance barely trembles.
Real Madrid thought they were fine at 3-1. Don't get comfortable.
The Iran ceasefire has an expiry date. So does this goodwill window.
The Michael biopic opens in days. Settle this before MJ is everywhere again.
Harry Styles bought a ring. You owe under two hundred dollars.
The US Navy seized a cargo ship over less principle than you're showing.
Bayern came back from two down in four minutes. No more excuses.
Japan's tsunami was 2.5 feet. This number is already taller.
Trump extended the ceasefire. Your partner is not extending anything.
Real Madrid's exit cost them pride. This is costing actual money.
Zoë Kravitz got a diamond ring. You owe a thousand dollars. One of you is winning.
The Iran naval blockade costs less per day to maintain than your credibility right now.
Japan's 7.7 and this balance both registered globally. Both caused damage.
Bayern's comeback needed a miracle. Your financial recovery will need a bigger one.
The US seized an Iranian cargo ship. Someone will come for your assets next.
Real Madrid had 15 Champions Leagues and still lost in stoppage time. This is worse.
Harry Styles proposed with a diamond. This debt proposed back.
theyOwe: They owe you pocket change. Like the Iran ceasefire — binding, but everyone's nervous.
Smaller than the tsunami waves. A ripple. But a ripple they owe you.
Less than a Bayern Munich kit. Owed. Not forgotten.
Not a lot. But Real Madrid also thought they were safe. Watch the stoppage time.
Less than a Michael biopic premiere ticket, which they also haven't bought you.
Harry Styles put a ring on it. Your partner can put this in your account.
Enough to blockade their Netflix until paid. The option exists.
Bayern scored twice in four minutes. You've been waiting longer than that.
The Michael Jackson estate settles debts faster. Think about what that means.
The ceasefire was extended. Their repayment deadline was not.
Japan's earthquake shifted tectonic plates. This is shifting your relationship similarly.
Zoë Kravitz flashed a diamond. Flash this invoice with equal confidence.
The Iran naval blockade tightens daily. So should your grip on this.
Bayern eliminated Real Madrid in four dramatic minutes. Eliminate their grace period.
Japan issued a national tsunami warning over a 7.7. You can send one email.
The US seized an Iranian cargo ship without negotiating. Inspiration.
The Michael biopic budget was enormous. This debt is auditioning for the sequel.
Harry Styles got engaged. Your partner owes you this much. One of you has momentum.
